title: IccConnect Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for IccConnect CMM configuration objects (IccCmmConfig.h/cpp)

colorSpaceSig.description: ICC color space signature as a 4-character string (e.g. 'XYZ ', 'Lab ', 'RGB ')

renderingIntent.description: ICC rendering intent - name string or integer (0-3)

transform.description: Xform LUT type to use for a profile

floatColorEncoding.description: Float color encoding for data I/O

fileEncoding.description: Pixel encoding for image file output

dstBool.description: Destination boolean - true/false or inherited from source

envVar.description: A single CMM environment variable binding

name.description: ICC signature string for the environment variable

value.description: Floating-point value assigned to the variable

envVarArray.description: Array of CMM environment variable bindings

profile.description: CIccCfgProfile - configuration for a single profile in a CMM chain

iccFile.description: Path to the ICC profile file. Null or omitted uses an embedded profile.

intent.description: Rendering intent for this profile step

iccEnvVars.description: Environment variables passed to the ICC profile calculator

pccFile.description: Path to a Profile Connection Conditions (PCC) profile

pccEnvVars.description: Environment variables passed to the PCC profile

adjustPcsLuminance.description: Scale PCS luminance to match the observing PCC illuminant

useBPC.description: Apply black-point compensation for this profile step

useHToS.description: Use hue-to-saturation transform for this profile step

useV5SubProfile.description: Prefer the V5 sub-profile when present

useD2BxB2Dx.description: Prefer DToBx/BToDx multi-processing element tags over AToBx/BToAx tags when both are present. Spectral-only profiles (with a populated spectralPCS) automatically use DToBx without this flag.

interpolation.description: CLUT interpolation method for this profile

profileSequence.description: CIccCfgProfileSequence - ordered list of profiles forming a CMM chain

connectOptions.description: CIccCfgConnectOptions - common IccConnect CMM construction options

threads.description: Thread count for standard CMM apply. 1 uses the scalar CMM; 0 uses hardware concurrency; values greater than 1 wrap the CMM with CIccThreadedCmm.

pccWeight.description: CIccCfgPccWeight - a PCC profile with an associated spectral search weight

weight.description: Relative weight used during spectral PCC search

dataEntry.description: CIccCfgDataEntry - a single color sample record (field names are abbreviated for compactness)

d.description: Debug information lines for this sample

colorData.description: CIccCfgColorData - a block of color samples with space and encoding metadata

encoding.description: Numeric encoding for destination sample values

srcEncoding.description: Numeric encoding for source sample values

dataApply.description: CIccCfgDataApply - options for applying a CMM to color-data files

srcSpace.description: Override color space for 'legacy' or 'it8' source files

srcFile.description: Path to the source data file. Omit to use the inline colorData section.

dstFile.description: Path for the destination output file. Omit to write to stdout.

dstEncoding.description: Numeric encoding for destination output values

dstDigits.description: Total field width for formatted numeric output (0 = auto)

dstPrecision.description: Decimal places for formatted numeric output

imageApply.description: CIccCfgImageApply - options for applying a CMM to image files

srcImageFile.description: Path to the source image file

dstImageFile.description: Path for the destination image file

dstEncoding.description: Bit depth / encoding for the destination image

dstCompression.description: Enable compression in the destination image, or inherit from source

dstPlanar.description: Use planar (band-interleaved) layout in the destination image, or inherit from source

dstEmbedIcc.description: Embed the destination ICC profile in the output image, or inherit from source

createLink.description: CIccCfgCreateLink - options for creating a device-link or cube-file output

linkFile.description: Output path for the device-link or cube file

linkGridSize.description: Number of grid points per channel in the output CLUT

linkPrecision.description: Decimal precision for cube-file output (cubeFile linkType only)

linkTitle.description: Description string written into the device-link profile header

linkMinRange.description: Minimum input range value for cube-file output

linkMaxRange.description: Maximum input range value for cube-file output

useSourceTransform.description: Apply the source profile's forward transform when building the link

searchApplyInitial.description: Initial CMM state for spectral search (CIccCfgSearchApply 'initial' sub-object)

intent.description: Initial rendering intent before profile search

transform.description: Initial transform type before profile search

adjustPcsLuminance.description: Scale PCS luminance to match the observing PCC illuminant

useV5SubProfile.description: Prefer the V5 sub-profile when present

interpolation.description: CLUT interpolation method for the initial state

profileSequence.description: Fixed profile chain applied before the spectral search

initial.description: Initial CMM state used as the starting point for spectral search

pccWeights.description: Weighted PCC candidates for spectral search

description: Top-level IccConnect configuration document. Must contain either a profile-apply configuration (profileSequence + one of applyData/applyImage/createLink) or a search-apply configuration (searchApply).

connect.description: Common IccConnect construction options. Currently only standard profile CMM creation uses threaded apply.

profileSequence.description: Ordered list of profiles forming the CMM chain (iccApplyProfiles / iccApplyNamedCmm)

createLink.description: Options for device-link or cube-file creation

colorData.description: Inline color sample data (used when applyData.srcType is 'colorData')
